mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( id, name, description, type, face_value, min_spend, valid_days, per_user_limit, total_stock, seckill_total_stock, remaining_stock, seckill_remaining_stock, status, seckill_start_at, seckill_end_at, create_time, update_time, version, shard_index ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{type}, #{faceValue}, #{minSpend}, #{validDays}, #{perUserLimit}, #{totalStock}, #{seckillTotalStock}, #{remainingStock}, #{seckillRemainingStock}, #{status}, #{seckillStartAt}, #{seckillEndAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{version}, #{shardIndex} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE status = 1 AND create_time >= NOW() - (valid_days * INTERVAL '1 day') GROUP BY id, shard_index ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1000
SELECT * FROM coupon GROUP BY id, shard_index ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1000
SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id} GROUP BY id, shard_index LIMIT 1

SELECT id, shard_index, name, description, type, face_value, min_spend, valid_days, per_user_limit, total_stock, seckill_total_stock, remaining_stock, seckill_remaining_stock, status, seckill_start_at, seckill_end_at, create_time, update_time, version FROM coupon WHERE id = #{couponId} ORDER BY shard_index

SELECT id, shard_index, name, description, type, face_value, min_spend, valid_days, per_user_limit, total_stock, seckill_total_stock, remaining_stock, seckill_remaining_stock, status, seckill_start_at, seckill_end_at, create_time, update_time, version FROM coupon WHERE id = #{couponId} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, shard_index, name, description, type, face_value, min_spend, valid_days, per_user_limit, total_stock, seckill_total_stock, remaining_stock, seckill_remaining_stock, status, seckill_start_at, seckill_end_at, create_time, update_time, version FROM coupon WHERE shard_index = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1000
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET seckill_start_at = #{seckillStartAt}, seckill_end_at = #{seckillEndAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId}
UPDATE coupon SET seckill_start_at = #{seckillStartAt}, seckill_end_at = #{seckillEndAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex}

UPDATE coupon SET seckill_remaining_stock = seckill_remaining_stock + #{change}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex} AND version = #{version} AND seckill_remaining_stock + #{change} >= 0

UPDATE coupon SET seckill_remaining_stock = seckill_remaining_stock + #{change}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex} AND seckill_remaining_stock + #{change} >= 0
UPDATE coupon SET remaining_stock = remaining_stock + #{change}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND version = #{version} AND remaining_stock + #{change} >= 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE status = 1 AND create_time <= #{expireTime} GROUP BY id, shard_index LIMIT 1000
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId}
UPDATE coupon SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{couponId} AND shard_index = #{shardIndex}
